TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pranab Mukherjee ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Pranab Mukherjee, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1935) mrhuw India ta' misuw hya' ga Pranab Mukherjee, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: pranaő≤ mukńßerjee rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, pranaő≤ mukńßerjee, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw in*ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pranaő≤ mukńßerjee, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Pranab Mukherjee ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Pranab Mukherjee, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1935) mrhuw India ta' misuw hya' ga Pranab Mukherjee, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw in*ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pranaő≤ mukńßerjee, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
